---
title: "Proof of Concept: Embedded MyOpenMath and Scoring"
format: 
  live-html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .btn-exercise-solution { display: none !important; }
        </style>
    webr:
      packages:
        - dplyr
        - gradethis
        - jsonlite
        - base64enc
      cell-options: 
        persist: true
    live:
      show-solutions: true
---
{{< include ./_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
{{< include ./_extensions/r-wasm/live/_gradethis.qmd >}}

```{webr}
#| edit: false
#| output: false
#| define:
#|   - ok_response
library(htmltools)
ok_response <- function(response, n) {
  if (is.na(response)) div(HTML("You haven't answered yet."), style = "color: purple")
  else if (response == n) div(HTML("Correct ✓"), style = "color: green")
  else div(HTML("Incorrect ✗"), style = "color: red")
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
function ok_checkbox(response, n) {
  if (!response || response.length === 0)
    return html`<span style="color:purple">You haven't answered yet.</span>`;
  if (response.toString() === n)
    return html`<span style="color:green">Correct ✓</span>`;
  return html`<span style="color:red">Not Yet! ✗</span>`;
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| message: false
//| results: false
mutable ok_response = (response, n) => { return html`Loading...` };
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

problemRegistry = ({
  "q1_combine_like_terms": "q1_combine_like_terms",
  "q2_simplify_rational":  "q2_simplify_rational",
  "q3_match_trig":         "q3_match_trig"
});
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

mutable momScores = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.values(problemRegistry).map(d => [d, "unattempted"])
);
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  let lastFrameId = null;

  window.addEventListener("message", function(event) {
    if (event.origin !== "https://www.myopenmath.com") return;

    let data;
    try {
      data = typeof event.data === "string" ? JSON.parse(event.data) : event.data;
    } catch(e) { return; }

    if (data.subject === "lti.frameResize" && data.iframe_resize_id) {
      lastFrameId = data.iframe_resize_id;
    }

    if (data.action === "updatescores" && Array.isArray(data.scores)) {
      const descriptor = problemRegistry[lastFrameId];
      if (descriptor && data.scores.length > 0) {
        const current = mutable momScores;
        const updated = Object.assign({}, current);
        const raw = data.scores[0];
        updated[descriptor] = typeof raw === "number" ? String(raw) : raw;
        mutable momScores = updated;
      }
    }
  });
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// ── Hash utilities ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function toBase64(str) {
  return btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(str)));
}

// ── Reactive hash ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Re-evaluates automatically whenever momScores changes.
mom_hash = {
  momScores;   // reactive dependency

  const scores = momScores;

  // Build per-question summary objects
  const questions = {};
  for (const [descriptor, scoreString] of Object.entries(scores)) {
    if (scoreString === "unattempted") {
      questions[descriptor] = {
        raw_scores: "unattempted",
        parts_total: null,
        parts_correct: null,
        score: null,
        result: "unattempted"
      };
    } else {
      const parts = scoreString.includes("~")
        ? scoreString.split("~").map(Number)
        : [parseFloat(scoreString)];
      const total = scoreString.includes("~") ? parts.length : 1;
      const correct = parts.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
      const score = correct / total;
    
      questions[descriptor] = {
        raw_scores: scoreString,
        parts_total: total,
        parts_correct: correct,
        score: score,
        result: score === 1 ? "fully_correct" : score === 0 ? "incorrect" : "partially_correct"
      };
    }
  }

  const payload = {
    notebook: "Proof of Concept: Embedded MyOpenMath",
    type: "mom_questions",
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    questions: questions
  };

  return toBase64(JSON.stringify(payload));
}
```

## Embedded MyOpenMath Exercises

### Combine Like Terms

<iframe 
    src="https://www.myopenmath.com/multiembedq.php?id=1252&iframe_resize_id=q1_combine_like_terms"
    width="100%" height="550" frameborder="0" id="mom-frame_combine_like_terms">
</iframe>

### Simplify a Rational Expression

<iframe 
    src="https://www.myopenmath.com/multiembedq.php?id=2126&iframe_resize_id=q2_simplify_rational"
    width="100%" height="550" frameborder="0" id="mom-frame_simplify_rational">
</iframe>

### Match Trig Functions and Ratios

<iframe 
    src="https://www.myopenmath.com/multiembedq.php?id=767912&iframe_resize_id=q3_match_trig"
    width="100%" height="550" frameborder="0" id="mom-frame_match_trig">
</iframe>

## Submit

If you are part of a course with an instructor who is grading your work on these activities, please copy and submit the hash below using the method your instructor has requested.

:::{.callout-warning}
## Question Hash

The hash below encodes your scores on the embedded MyOpenMath questions in this activity. It updates automatically each time you submit an answer. When you are finished, copy and submit it.

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
html`<div style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.85em; background: #f5f5f5; padding: 12px; border-radius: 6px; word-break: break-all; border: 1px solid #ddd; user-select: all; cursor: pointer;" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText(this.innerText)">
  ${mom_hash}
</div>
<p style="margin-top: 8px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #555;">
  Click the box to copy to clipboard.
</p>`
```

:::
